case_title: GREGG HOOD VS. GREGANGELO HERRERA et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOOD, GREGG AS TO DEFENDANT HERRERA, GREGANGELO FERNS, JEFREY DOES 1 TO 2 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAR-11-2011 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-06-2010 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         FEB-24-2011
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR JAN-18-2011 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 610
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 AGAINST GREGG HOOD, FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: APR-18-2011, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAY-03-2011. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-18-2011 CONTINUED TO JUN-20-2011 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-18-2011 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE MAR-11-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOOD, GREGG ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PROOF OF SERVICE ON JAN-18-2011 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR APR-18-2011 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 610
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUN-20-2011 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 610

NO APPEARANCE, NOR OBJECTION FILED. CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING JUN-20-2011 AT 1:30PM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

parties.name: HOOD, GREGG 3890 22ND STREET SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94114

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-20-2011 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance, nor objection filed. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, it is hereby ordered that this matter be dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-18-2011 Continued To Jun-20-11 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $350.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 6/20/2011 at 1:30 PM, in Department 610. Proceedings not reported. (610)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-25-2011 Set For Order To Show Cause On Apr-18-11 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 610
